overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic city. The camera follows a character along a canal-side sidewalk, under a glowing TENGU archway, past digital billboards and vending machines, and into a green-lit food stall. The environment features vibrant cyberpunk aesthetics with purple and green neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: canal-side pedestrian promenade with neon signage

events.description: camera settles into third-person follow behind a character in a suit

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a water canal, approaching a neon-lit archway

notable_agents.action: character in business suit walking ahead toward the archway

entered.detail: reflective water canal running parallel to the sidewalk with neon reflections
tall palm tree with textured trunk in a raised planter
tall buildings with bright green and pink neon advertisements
large illuminated archway with TENGU signage and purple-pink neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a nighttime canal-side promenade with reflective water on the right and neon-lit buildings on the left. The camera follows a character walking toward a distant glowing archway labeled TENGU. Sparse pedestrians walk along the wide concrete sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered plaza under TENGU arch with digital displays

events.description: passes under the TENGU archway into a more enclosed neon-lit space
lighting shifts to dominant purple and green neon as camera moves deeper under the canopy

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered archway area, passing other pedestrians and approaching vending machines

notable_agents.action: man in red shirt and shorts walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: massive curved screen displaying animated train and text reading Ok, so what do you need?
pair of bright purple automated vending kiosks with yellow warning symbols
large spiky pink neon sculpture resembling a palm tree or firework

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the TENGU arch into a semi-covered plaza bathed in purple and green neon light. A massive digital billboard curves along the right wall while purple vending machines line the left. The canal disappears behind as the space becomes more enclosed and crowded.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with pawnshop and food vendors

events.description: slight turn to the right while approaching the pawnshop area

agents.ego_description: navigating through moderate foot traffic toward a pawnshop and food stall area

notable_agents.action: woman in gray jacket and shorts walking ahead

entered.detail: green and purple neon sign reading PAWNSHOP above a storefront
open-air food counter with green neon lighting and seated customers

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper into the covered commercial area, the camera passes the purple vending machines and approaches a pawnshop with bright neon signage. The large digital billboard remains visible on the left while a food stall with green interior lighting appears ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: green-lit food stall with counter seating

events.description: enters the food stall area with green neon ceiling lights

agents.ego_description: entering the food stall and approaching the counter where customers are seated

notable_agents.action: woman with blonde hair sitting at the counter eating

entered.detail: long metal counter with white stools and food plates, green neon overhead
television mounted above counter showing news broadcast with male anchor
green fluorescent tube lights illuminating the stall interior

segments.scene_description: The character enters the food stall, leaving the covered walkway behind. Inside, green neon lights illuminate a counter where several customers sit on stools eating. A television screen displays a news broadcast above the serving area. The space is intimate and enclosed compared to the open promenade outside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, neon-lit canal promenade into the intimate, enclosed interior of a futuristic food stall. It begins by following a character along a wide concrete sidewalk beside reflective water, moving steadily toward a distant, glowing TENGU archway. As the character passes under the arch, the environment shifts into a semi-covered plaza where the open sky is replaced by a massive curving digital billboard and rows of purple vending machines. The scene then deepens into a crowded commercial area, passing a bright neon pawnshop before turning toward a food stall bathed in green light. Finally, the camera enters the stall, leaving the walkway behind to reveal a small counter with seated customers and a television screen broadcasting the news.
